sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61165" key="kufw/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῡφ-ώνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n61165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">salve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
